Pride in Penhill Survey

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

This questionnaire is to make sure that the Pride in Place Programme reflects what you, the residents of Penhill want from the £20m. As your MP I am committed to making sure your voice gets heard and the community, not politicians make the decisions.

Name *
Address *
Which 3 matter most to you? *
What 2 things would you like to see more of? *

I will be in regular contact with people of Penhill and communicating through my social media channels to keep you updated on progress and get your feedback every step of the way.

We also need local people to be members of Pride in Penhill’s community board, which will be responsible for listening to local feedback and planning how the community’s £20 million is spent.

Pinetrees Community Centre, The Circle, Swindon, SN2 1RF

01793 540040

will@willstone.org.uk
